why_it_matters: Observed real-world unit sales outcome used to measure actual market impact.
recommended_role: Observed demand target and comparison baseline.

why_it_matters: Observed dollar sales outcome used to evaluate revenue effects.
Approximates non-promo unit demand and is often cleaner for cannibalization analysis.
Approximates non-promo dollar demand for cleaner revenue comparisons.
Separates promo-attributed unit lift from underlying demand.
recommended_role: Promo control, not a generic week-over-week change measure.

why_it_matters: Separates promo-attributed dollar lift from underlying demand.
Shows unit volume sold while on promotion.
Shows unit volume outside promotion windows.
Shows dollar sales while on promotion.
Shows dollar sales outside promotion windows.
Shows how many stores are actually selling the product.
Shows unweighted store distribution.
Captures total distribution while accounting for active UPCs.
Shows promoted distribution footprint.
Shows non-promo distribution footprint.

measure_name: Average Weekly Units Per Store Selling Per Item
why_it_matters: Closest SPINS measure to units per store selling per item.

measure_name: Average Weekly Dollars Per Store Selling Per Item
why_it_matters: Closest SPINS measure to dollars per store selling per item.
Measures unit productivity normalized by ACV of selling stores.
Measures dollar productivity normalized by ACV of selling stores.
Measures unit productivity per ACV point.
Measures dollar productivity per ACV point.
Measures unit productivity per total distribution point.
Measures dollar productivity per total distribution point.
recommended_role: Secondary revenue control for reach-adjusted productivity.

why_it_matters: Tracks observed average product price.
Approximates regular price absent promotion.
Tracks price during promoted selling periods.
Tracks price during non-promoted selling periods.
Measures average discount depth under promotion.
Measures unit response to merchandising support.
Measures dollar response to merchandising support.
Shows unit share within the category.
Shows unit share within the subcategory.
recommended_role: Primary market-position signal for closer substitutes.

why_it_matters: Shows dollar share within the category.
Shows dollar share within the subcategory.
recommended_role: Secondary revenue position signal for close substitutes.

why_it_matters: Identifies when a product first entered the market.
Shows how long a product has been selling in the time frame.
